name: Druva Data Resiliency Cloud
description: Integrates with Druva REST API for endpoint backup management (inSync), enterprise workload protection (Phoenix), backup job monitoring, and device management

actions.name: List Backup Jobs
actions.description: Retrieve backup job history for endpoints and enterprise workloads with status and performance details

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by backup status (success, failed, in_progress, warning)

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for backup query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for backup query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of jobs to return

actions.name: List Protected Devices
actions.description: Retrieve all devices with inSync client installed showing backup status, OS, and client version

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by device status (active, inactive, disabled)

parameters.name: os
parameters.description: Filter by operating system (Windows, macOS, Linux)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of devices to return

actions.name: List Users
actions.description: Retrieve all users managed by Druva inSync with their backup profiles and device associations

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of users to return

actions.name: List Enterprise Workloads
actions.description: Retrieve enterprise workloads protected by Druva Phoenix including servers, NAS, and databases

parameters.name: resourceType
parameters.description: Filter by resource type (server, nas, database, vmware, hyperv)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of workloads to return

actions.name: Get Storage Report
actions.description: Retrieve storage consumption reports showing backup data volumes and trends

actions.name: List Active Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve active alerts for backup failures, device connectivity issues, and policy violations

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by alert severity (critical, warning, info)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of alerts to return
